lastReleaseMessage: Extend the camera zoom ladder so max zoom-in reaches native 1.0x (ZOOM_LEVELS now [0.45, 0.6, 0.9, 1.0]). The old top step of 0.9x meant a 256px sprite never rendered above ~230px; now it hits full 256px at closest zoom, which is the native-size floor the artist needs to evaluate assets. Boot zoom unchanged; lower steps still zoom out for the strategic view.

barRaise.topFinding: Only two commits landed since the 2026-07-01 full 16-lens pass, both documentation or trivial: v0.59.27 extended the camera zoom ladder to native 1.0x, and b717fd0 refreshed ARCHITECTURE.md, which closes the queued maintainability-01 (doc now stamped v0.59.27 with the v0.59.9-21 extraction modules enumerated by path anchor). The shipped game is unchanged and still builds, ships, saves, and plays the full M1 loop; both hard-rule gates re-checked clean (GDD tail </html>, no alien-portal/Order 42 in source), so no BLOCK. What did not move: the audit-glob display bug (observability-01) is now open four runs, one short of chronic; the non-atomic save write (data-integrity-01) and the missing pathfinding/save tests (reliability-01/02, data-integrity-02) still stand; and M1 is still anchored at 50% while effectively shipped. The same refresh that fixed the stamp left the stale ASSET_SCALE_MASTER refs (maintainability-04) untouched. Verdict stays in-progress: nothing is broken; near-term work is test-the-pathfinding, harden-the-save, make-the-50%-honest, fix-the-glob.

actions.title: Fix the audit glob at scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1:53 (AUDIT-*.md to CANONICAL_AUDIT-*.md) and re-run the BR release so the dashboard audit block stops shipping null.

Add a deterministic headless pathfinding/collision test harness (find_path open/walled/unreachable-cap-partial, corner-round via-cell, slide_move, spatial_index get_units_near box-edge) and capture a repro trace before shipping further fixes on that module.
Harden the save write to temp-path + readback-parse + rename-over-slot with a .bak of the prior autosave, closing the non-atomic open-truncate write on the FUSE mount.
Reconcile .project-context.json completion so the M1 50% is honest: advance M1 (audio caveat) and open M2, or write the concrete remaining gates into completion.remaining.
Store the executed artist-contractor agreement in a version-backed / off-machine location and record its location in docs.
Add docs/LICENSES.md recording the Spine editor license held, the spine-godot version/source, and redistribution terms.
Capture one peak-wave (day-28 horde) frame profile on a current v0.59.x build and record FPS plus top costs in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md.
Add a headless save round-trip test (seeded state, save/load, assert resources/day/research/rosters and tile positions).
Replace both em-dash entities in the BR gate page (YaE brackish-rising/index.html) and grep the gate pages to confirm the sweep covers them.
Target the next extraction pass at gameplay.gd (2878 lines, now the largest untouched god-file).
Delete the dead class_name WorldGenerator at source/world/world_generator.gd:7 and regenerate scripts/.bp_baseline.json.
